# Landscape — comparative studies of whole systems

**Scope.** Cross-cutting studies of other people's harnesses and the field as a whole:
framework comparison matrices, novelty assessment, closest-neighbor deep dives, and ecosystem
censuses. These documents span every subtopic; they live here so single-topic folders stay
single-topic.

**Coverage: ● rich, with a standing re-audit cadence** (vendors keep absorbing the periphery).

## Holdings

- [landscape-and-novelty.md](landscape-and-novelty.md) — the design vs 20+ agents/frameworks;
  the comparison matrix; what is genuinely novel; the surviving design critique (§4, updated
  2026-07-04).
- [zenith-and-meta-zenith.md](zenith-and-meta-zenith.md) — the closest-neighbor harness,
  studied from the local clone: architecture, terminal-reviewer stopping rule, RALPH-ablation
  (with caveats), Meta-Zenith, benchmark-claim verification, candidate imports.
- [ecosystem-mining/](ecosystem-mining/README.md) — the 2026-07-06 study of 11 cloned
  ecosystem repos: per-repo profiles, five theme documents, ranked contribution
  opportunities. Headlines: reward-hacking hole 11/11, window awareness 0/11, planning
  interview commoditized 5/11.

**Reading note:** ecosystem-mining's five theme documents are the thin-subtopic folders'
best current material — [spec-elicitation-and-planning](ecosystem-mining/spec-elicitation-and-planning.md)
→ `planning/`, [memory-and-lessons](ecosystem-mining/memory-and-lessons.md) →
`memory-and-context/`, [parallelization-and-decomposition](ecosystem-mining/parallelization-and-decomposition.md)
→ `orchestration/`, [limits-resume-and-wake](ecosystem-mining/limits-resume-and-wake.md) →
`unattended-operation/`, [verification-and-blind-gating](ecosystem-mining/verification-and-blind-gating.md)
→ `validation/`. The study stays intact here because it is one dated, internally-linked
census; the subtopic READMEs point in.

## Open questions

- Standing: re-audit the leverage map on each Claude Code feature wave (§4.3 commoditization).
- Watch for any independent Zenith reproduction (none as of 2026-07-09).
